mainText: The Son of God retains His Father’s Will.The son of man perceives an alien will, and wishes it were so.And thus does his perception serve his wish by giving it appearances of truth.Yet can perception serve another goal. It is not bound to specialness but by your choice.And it IS given you to make a different choice, and use perception for a different purpose.And what you see will serve that purpose well, and PROVE its own reality to you. twenty five The Remedy The Christ in you inhabits not a body.Yet He is in you. And thus it must be that YOU are not within a body.What is within you cannot be outside. And it is certain that you cannot be apart from what is at the very center of your life.What gives you life cannot be housed in death. No more can you. Christ is within a frame of holiness whose only purpose is that He may be made manifest to those who know Him not, that He may call to them to come to Him, and see Him where they thought their bodies were. Then will their bodies melt away, that they may frame His holiness in them. No-one who carries Christ in him can fail to recognize Him everywhere. EXCEPT in bodies.
